notes: Color-only UI follow-up after v4.3.185: removes the tan-to-light-green page gradient and switches the app background to a solid dirt-brown tone.
Retunes main app panels to a light-leaf-green medium surface and detail/modal surfaces to a lighter leaf-green surface.
Uses sky blue as the secondary light accent for inputs, support badges, image placeholders, and other places that need a lighter contrast color.
Updates the boot.js bundled version floor and index.html boot query so the version badge remains aligned with the installed package.
No species records, route/category logic, edible statuses, toxicity statuses, medicinal fields, image fields, map features, or home-page structure changed.
